title: The Curse of a Bloodline
description: On pages 2–4, this part follows King Harald, Unknown person #1, Usopp, Unknown person #2, Giants, Robin as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.
scene: The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 15 years ago (that same year), all over the world...

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Harald's efforts are paying off, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Those giant marines...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...are really doing a good job!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're so reliable!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I always thought they looked scary, but now I wouldn't mind meetin' one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Can't you get us stocked up again?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Elbaf seafood is super popular now, y'know!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I bet it is!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This here is a top quality Elbaf Cedar!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a rare and tricky item to import!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll take it already!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Elbaf, New World

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: When we finally become a member nation!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: HARALD!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HARAAALD!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I think we should build sightseeing ships...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So our people can freely visit all of our Allies!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're actually a rare minority...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: From the perspective of the outside world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there are many nations out there with a wide variety of races coexisting!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is thanks to a culture of mutual respect!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's join the larger world. Make new friends, and grow in knowledge together!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That sounds great!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll make it happen, IDA.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're one step away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Our Future has NEVER BEEN BRIGHTER!!

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: Yeah, let's ditch this warrior crap...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: This is all thanks to you, Saul...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: better sharp kids than sharp blades, huh? Dereski shi!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But ain't ya afraid you've lost somethin' here, Harald?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't believe that military power is what makes a country strong anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's 'cause of IDA... she taught me everything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Meeting her was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I D A

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...The greatest blessing of my life.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Hey, Harald.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Elbaf really has changed a lot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I first came here, there was tons of internal conflict; it was scary...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But, you've changed everything.

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
